name: Part with blank unit of measure is tracked in dimensionless pieces
steps:
Given a newly created part 'Generic Component' with the Units field left blank
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Generic Component'
When the user views the part details
Then the part shows the default unit as 'pcs' (dimensionless quantity)

name: Set a custom unit of measure for a part
steps:
Given a part 'Copper Wire' exists with the default unit of measure (blank/pieces)
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Copper Wire'
When the user edits the part and enters 'm' in the 'Units' field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'Copper Wire' displays 'Units: m' in the part details
